title: Recipe nutrition calculation and immutable snapshot
summary: 승인된 재료 영양·대표 환산만 사용해 recipe nutrient vectors와 completeness/quality를 결정론적으로 계산하고 immutable snapshot, Recipe Detail projection, nullable Meal pin으로 제공한다.
goal: Sparse public-data coverage를 거짓 complete나 0으로 숨기지 않으면서 사용자가 Recipe Detail에서 재현 가능한 예상 영양을 확인하고 과거 Recipe Meal이 생성 시점 snapshot을 유지하게 한다.

out_of_scope: Prepared food public or private catalog and immutable product nutrition versions
Product planner entry CRUD and recipe product read model adapter
Meal day week planner nutrition aggregate
Shopping cooking leftover XP or activity product exclusions
Medical advice actual consumption targets barcode OCR dining out meal kit
Cooking yield retention absorption disposal precision modeling
Runtime public API refresh unreviewed promotion fuzzy matching generic density or unproven piece conversion
notes: Recipe nutrition Stage 2/3 backend merged through PR #1012 and Stage 4 Recipe Detail UI is under current-head review in PR #1013. The approved contract treats recipe amount and unit as actual edible-use quantity without new recipe state or size columns; state-unspecified direct and conversion paths require exactly one eligible chain, exact piece paths require size_code plus preparation_state, and missing data stays partial or unavailable rather than zero. Isolated PostgreSQL 17 real DB closeout applied all migrations and FoodSafety-30 seed, preserved approved coverage 13/124 and at least one link in 21/30 recipes, verified actual owner/bootstrap and cross-owner 403/0 writes, current snapshot pin, rollback, and cleanup. Stage 4 Vitest 80/80, 390px/320px/desktop Playwright evidence, accessibility, source/XSS/race guards, and independent visual authority 96/100 with blocker 0 passed.
